hmong.household_spending_on_goods_and_servic: Kev siv nyiaj ntawm tsev neeg rau khoom thiab kev pab. Feem loj tshaj plaws ntawm GDP.
hmong.business_spending_on_capital_goods_new: Kev siv nyiaj lag luam rau cov khoom peev, kev tsim kho tshiab, thiab kev hloov khoom cia.
hmong.government_spending_on_goods_and_servi: Kev siv nyiaj ntawm tsoom fwv rau khoom thiab kev pab (tsis suav nrog kev hloov pauv xws li social security).
hmong.exports_minus_imports_currently_negati: Xa tawm rho kev nkag. Tam sim no negative rau Teb Chaws Meskas (kev lag luam poob).
hmong.gdp_growth_rate: Tus nqi loj hlob ntawm GDP
hmong.percentage_change_in_real_gdp_2_3_is_h: Feem pua hloov hauv GDP tiag. 2-3% yog zoo.
hmong.measures_average_price_changes_the_mai: Ntsuas cov kev hloov nqi nruab nrab. Qhov ntsuas tseem ceeb ntawm kev nce nqi.
hmong.percent_of_labor_force_without_jobs_na: Feem pua ntawm cov neeg ua haujlwm uas tsis muaj haujlwm. Tus nqi ntuj yog li 4%.
hmong.interest_rate_banks_charge_each_other_: Tus paj laum uas cov txhab nyiaj sib them. Cov cuab yeej tseem ceeb ntawm Fed.
hmong.index_of_500_large_us_companies_proxy_: Index ntawm 500 lub tuam txhab loj hauv Meskas. Sawv cev rau khw stock.
hmong.consumer_confidence: Kev ntseeg siab ntawm cov neeg yuav khoom
hmong.survey_of_how_optimistic_consumers_fee: Kev tshawb fawb txog qhov cov neeg yuav khoom xav zoo li cas rau txoj kev lag luam.
hmong.number_of_new_residential_construction: Tus naj npawb ntawm cov haujlwm tsim tsev nyob tshiab uas pib.
hmong.trade_balance: Kev sib npaug ntawm kev lag luam
hmong.exports_minus_imports_surplus_positive: Xa tawm rho kev nkag. Seem = positive, poob = negative.
hmong.total_government_borrowing_us_debt_is_: Tag nrho tsoom fwv qiv nyiaj. Meskas cov nuj nqis yog li $34 trillion (2024).
hmong.plots_interest_rates_vs_bond_maturity_: Qhia paj laum vs bond maturity. Rov qab = cim ntawm recession.
hmong.survey_of_manufacturing_activity_50_ex: Kev tshawb fawb txog kev tsim khoom. >50 = nthuav dav, <50 = tsawg.
hmong.measures_income_inequality_0_perfect_e: Ntsuas kev tsis sib npaug ntawm nyiaj tau los. 0 = sib npaug tag nrho, 1 = tsis sib npaug tshaj plaws.
hmong.the_most_popular_simple_budgeting_fram: Cov qauv npaj nyiaj yooj yim uas nrov tshaj plaws.
hmong.pay_yourself_first: Them rau koj tus kheej ua ntej
hmong.save_a_fixed_percentage_before_spendin: Txuag ib feem pua ruaj ua ntej siv rau lwm yam.
hmong.every_dollar_gets_assigned_a_job_incom: Txhua daus las muaj ib txoj haujlwm. Nyiaj tau los rho kev siv = xoom ncaj nraim.
hmong.what_should_you_do_first: Koj yuav tsum ua dab tsi ua ntej?
hmong.why_doesn_t_gas_demand_drop_as_much_as: Vim li cas kev xav tau roj tsis poob ntau li koj xav?
hmong.why_does_raising_rates_hurt_stocks: Vim li cas kev tsav paj laum ua rau cov stock raug mob?
hmong.which_country_has_comparative_advantag: Lub teb chaws twg muaj txiaj ntsig sib piv ntawm computer?
hmong.what_is_the_most_likely_long_term_effe: Dab tsi yog qhov cuam tshuam ntev ntev uas feem ntau tshwm sim?
hmong.what_is_the_true_cost_of_grad_school: Dab tsi yog tus nqi tiag ntawm grad school?
hmong.what_economic_consequence_followed_in_: Kev cuam tshuam nyiaj txiag dab tsi tshwm sim xyoo 2021-2022?
hmong.what_will_the_other_station_likely_do: Lub chaw txhaws roj tsheb tom ntej yuav ua li cas?
hmong.what_type_of_market_failure_is_this: Qhov no yog hom kev poob khw dab tsi?
hmong.how_much_should_you_contribute_at_mini: Koj yuav tsum pab tsawg kawg npaum li cas?
hmong.supply_demand_2: Kev muab thiab kev xav tau
hmong.price_rises_less_demanded_more_supplie: Nqi nce ← xav tau tsawg, muab ntau. Nqi poob ← xav tau ntau, muab tsawg. Sib npaug: qhov chaw uas kev muab ntsib kev xav tau.
hmong.gdp_c_i_g_x_m_consumption_investment_g: GDP = C + I + G + (X−M). Kev siv + Kev nqis peev + Tsoom fwv + Cov khoom xa tawm net. Ntsuas tag nrho cov khoom tsim tawm.
hmong.demand_pull_too_much_money_chasing_goo: Demand-pull: nyiaj ntau dhau caum khoom. Cost-push: tus nqi tsim khoom nce. Built-in: kev cia siab ntawm wage-price spiral.
hmong.interest_rates_ffr_open_market_operati: Paj laum (FFR) • Open market operations (yuav/muag bond) • Reserve requirements • Discount window • Forward guidance
hmong.fiscal_congress_tax_spend_monetary_fed: Fiscal = Congress (se/kev siv nyiaj). Monetary = Fed (paj laum/cov nyiaj muaj). Ob qho cuam tshuam rau txoj kev lag luam sib txawv.
hmong.divide_72_by_the_interest_rate_to_find: Faib 72 rau tus paj laum kom pom tias koj cov nyiaj yuav ob npaug tau pes tsawg xyoo. 72 ÷ 8% = 9 xyoo ob npaug.
hmong.elastic_1_luxury_has_substitutes_inela: Elastic (>1): khoom kim, muaj lwm yam hloov. Inelastic (<1): xav tau, tsis muaj hloov. Unit elastic (=1): % hloov P = % hloov Q.
hmong.perfect_competition_monopolistic_compe: Kev sib tw zoo tag nrho ← Kev sib tw monopolistic ← Oligopoly ← Monopoly. Lub zog khw ntau dua = nqi siab dua, kev ua tau zoo tsawg dua.
hmong.canvas_summary_supply_demand: Daim duab kev muab-kev xav tau qhia kev xav tau, kev muab, nqi sib npaug, tus naj npawb sib npaug, seem, tsis txaus, thiab kev cuam tshuam ntawm se.
hmong.canvas_summary_personal_finance: Daim duab nyiaj txiag ntawm tus kheej qhia nyiaj npaj txhua hli ua daim duab kheej thiab kev kwv yees kev loj hlob ntawm paj laum sib tsub.
hmong.canvas_summary_stock_market: Daim duab khw stock qhia keeb kwm nqi ntawm lub tuam txhab xaiv, portfolio nyiaj ntsuab, kev tuav, thiab tus nqi tam sim no.
hmong.canvas_summary_stock_market_empty: Cheeb tsam duab stock npaj rau ib lub khw tsim. Pib khw simulation kom pom keeb kwm nqi thiab kev tuav.
hmong.canvas_summary_entrepreneur: Daim canvas simulation ua lag luam qhia huab cua, nqi rooj muag kua txiv qaub, nyiaj ntsuab, tus nqi, break-even point, thiab keeb kwm txiaj ntsig.
hmong.canvas_summary_macro: Daim dashboard nyiaj txiag teb chaws qhia GDP loj hlob, kev nce nqi, paj laum, tus nqi tsis muaj haujlwm, kev sib npaug lag luam, thiab keeb kwm txoj cai.
hmong.canvas_summary_inquiry: Hom kev tshawb nrhiav txoj cai siv plaub tus lever txoj cai los ua qauv rau ib qho macro yooj yim. Siv cov bar txoj cai hauv qab los sib piv GDP, kev nce nqi, thiab kev tsis muaj haujlwm hloov.
hmong.teacher_prompt_supply_demand: Kom cov tub ntxhais kawm kwv yees seb nqi, tus naj npawb, seem, los yog tsis txaus hloov ua ntej txav tus slider.
hmong.teacher_prompt_personal_finance: Kom cov tub ntxhais kawm hais ib qho trade-off hauv nyiaj npaj thiab ib qho laj thawj vim li cas pib paj laum sib tsub sai muaj txiaj ntsig.
hmong.teacher_prompt_stock_market: Kom cov tub ntxhais kawm cais nqi txav, keeb kwm lag luam, thiab kev pheej hmoo portfolio hauv ib qho piav qhia.
hmong.teacher_prompt_entrepreneur: Kom cov tub ntxhais kawm kwv yees tus naj npawb khob kom break-even ua ntej qhib lag luam ib hnub.
hmong.teacher_prompt_macro: Kom cov tub ntxhais kawm xaiv ib lub hom phiaj txoj cai thiab txheeb qhov ntsuas uas yuav qhia kev vam meej los yog kev puas tsuaj.
hmong.teacher_prompt_inquiry: Nug cov tub ntxhais kawm seb cov kws tshawb fawb yuav tsis pom zoo tshaj rau tus lever txoj cai twg, ces piav vim li cas tus qauv tsuas yog ib qho kwv yees.
hmong.back_to_stem_tools: Rov qab mus rau STEM cuab yeej
hmong.topic_tabs: Cov ntsiab lus Chav Kuaj Nyiaj Txiag
hmong.supply_demand_3: 📉 Kev muab thiab kev xav tau
hmong.supply_demand_the_price_discovery_engi: Kev muab thiab kev xav tau — lub cav nrhiav nqi
hmong.demand_slopes_down_cheap_buy_more_supp: Kev xav tau nqes (pheej yig = yuav ntau); kev muab nce (kim = tsim ntau). Nqi thiab tus naj npawb sib npaug nyob ntawm qhov chaw uas lawv ntsib. Adam Smith phau «Wealth of Nations» (1776) tseem yog lub hauv paus.
hmong.personal_finance_budgeting_saving_cred: Nyiaj txiag tus kheej — npaj nyiaj, txuag nyiaj, credit
hmong.50_30_20_needs_wants_save_compound_int: 50/30/20: xav tau / nyiam / txuag. Paj laum sib tsub yog qhov txuj ci yim; ntawm 7%, pib ntxov 30 xyoo hloov $1 ua $7.61. Them credit card tag — 19%/xyoo paj laum yog tus nqi paj laum ua phem.
hmong.stock_market_ownership_at_fractional_s: Khw stock — kev muaj feem me me
hmong.buy_a_share_own_a_slice_of_the_company: Yuav ib share = muaj feem ntawm lub tuam txhab. S&P 500 muab kwv yees li 10%/xyoo rov qab hauv 100 xyoo. Faib ua ntau yam (tsis txhob twv rau ib qho stock), tuav ntev (lub sijhawm hauv khw yeej dua kev twv sijhawm).
hmong.business_sim_you_re_the_founder: Simulator ua lag luam — koj yog tus tsim
hmong.revenue_costs_profit_break_even_point_: Nyiaj tau los − tus nqi = txiaj ntsig. Break-even point yog thaum cov nqi ruaj raug them. Feem ntau cov lag luam me poob rau xyoo 5; cov dim tau nrhiav tau kev sib haum ntawm khoom-khw. Tus nqi kh-tau-cov neeg yuav (CAC) vs tus nqi lub neej (LTV) yog kev suav txhua hnub ntawm tus tsim.
hmong.national_economy_gdp_inflation_unemplo: Nyiaj txiag teb chaws — GDP, kev nce nqi, kev tsis muaj haujlwm
hmong.gdp_measures_total_output_cpi_measures: GDP ntsuas tag nrho cov khoom tsim; CPI Ntsuas Nqi Khoom ntsuas kev nce nqi; kev tsis muaj haujlwm siv U-3 ua qhov hauv paus. Fed teeb paj laum kom sib npaug kev loj hlob thiab kev nce nqi — txoj haujlwm ob txoj uas Congress muab rau nws xyoo 1977.
hmong.reference_tool_group: Cov cuab yeej reference nyiaj txiag
hmong.play_the_simulations_to_discover_econo: Ua si cov simulation kom nrhiav pom cov tswvyim nyiaj txiag! Txhua qhov xwm txheej qhia ib lub tswvyim tshiab thiab ntxiv rau ntawm no.
hmong.ask_any_economics_question: Nug lo lus nug nyiaj txiag twg los tau...
hmong.inflation_calculator: 💲 Lub cav xam kev nce nqi
hmong.see_how_inflation_erodes_purchasing_po: Saib seb kev nce nqi noj lub zog yuav khoom li cas raws sijhawm. Ib daus las hnub no muaj nqi ntau dua ib daus las tag kis!
hmong.inflation_rate_percent: Tus nqi kev nce nqi, feem pua
hmong.the_economy_moves_through_repeating_cy: Txoj kev lag luam txav los ntawm cov voj voog rov ua dua ntawm kev nthuav dav thiab kev tsawg. Kev paub tias peb nyob qhov twg hauv lub voj voog pab kwv yees kauj ruam tom ntej.
hmong.compound_interest_calculator: 📊 Lub cav xam paj laum sib tsub
hmong.annual_return_percent: Kev rov qab txhua xyoo, feem pua
hmong.compound_interest_is_the_eighth_wonder: «Paj laum sib tsub yog qhov txuj ci yim ntawm ntiaj teb.» — Albert Einstein (raws li hais)
hmong.schools_of_economic_thought: 🏛️ Cov tsev kawm txog kev xav nyiaj txiag
hmong.economists_disagree_different_schools_: Cov kws tshawb fawb nyiaj txiag tsis pom zoo! Cov tsev kawm sib txawv muab cov lus teb sib txawv rau tib cov lus nug. Kev nkag siab cov kev xav no pab koj xav kom zoo txog txoj cai nyiaj txiag.
hmong.markets_range_from_perfect_competition: Cov khw muaj txij li kev sib tw zoo tag nrho (ntau tus muag, khoom sib xws) mus rau monopoly (ib tus muag xwb, khoom tshwj xeeb). Nyem txhua qho kom kawm ntxiv:
hmong.gross_domestic_product_measures_the_to: Gross Domestic Product ntsuas tag nrho tus nqi ntawm txhua cov khoom thiab kev pab kawg uas tsim hauv ib lub teb chaws ciam teb hauv ib xyoos. Rau Meskas, nws faib li nram no:
hmong.famous_economists: 🎓 Cov kws tshawb fawb nyiaj txiag nto npe
hmong.as_price_quantity_demanded_consumers_b: Thaum nqi ↑, tus naj npawb xav tau ↓. Cov neeg yuav tsawg dua thaum nqi nce. Kab kev xav tau nqes.
hmong.as_price_quantity_supplied_producers_m: Thaum nqi ↑, tus naj npawb muab ↑. Cov tsim khoom tsim ntau dua thaum nqi siab. Kab kev muab nce.
hmong.where_supply_meets_demand_this_e_point: Qhov chaw uas kev muab ntsib kev xav tau. Lub «E» point no teeb nqi khw (P*) thiab tus naj npawb (Q*) tau nws tus kheej.
hmong.shifts_vs_movements: Kev txav kab vs kev txav saum kab:
hmong.changing_the_price_moves_along_a_curve: Kev hloov nqi yog txav raws kab. Cov yam sab nraud (technology, nyiaj tau los, kev nyiam) txav tag nrho kab.
hmong.what_s_happening_right_now: 💡 Dab tsi tshwm sim tam sim no:
hmong.demand_shifted_right_more_people_want_: ▶ Kev xav tau txav mus sab xis — ntau tus neeg xav tau cov khoom no (tej zaum nyiaj tau los nce, los yog ib qho trend ua rau nrov). Nws thawb nqi thiab tus naj npawb sib npaug ob qho.
hmong.demand_shifted_left_fewer_people_want_: ▶ Kev xav tau txav mus sab laug — tsawg tus neeg xav tau cov khoom no (lwm yam hloov pheej yig dua, los yog kev nyiam hloov). Nqi thiab tus naj npawb ob qho poob.
hmong.supply_shifted_right_producers_can_mak: ▶ Kev muab txav mus sab xis — cov tsim khoom tsim tau pheej yig dua (technology tshiab, tus nqi input qis dua). Nqi poob, tab sis tus naj npawb nce.
hmong.supply_shifted_left_production_became_: ▶ Kev muab txav mus sab laug — kev tsim khoom nyuaj dua (xwm txheej ntuj, kev cai). Nqi nce, tab sis tus naj npawb poob.
hmong.price_elasticity_of_demand: 📏 Kev hloov ntawm nqi rau kev xav tau
hmong.measures_how_much_quantity_demanded_ch: ntsuas tias tus naj npawb xav tau hloov npaum li cas thaum nqi hloov.
hmong.goods_luxury_items_products_with_subst: cov khoom (khoom kim, khoom muaj lwm yam hloov) pom kev xav tau poob ntau thaum nqi nce me ntsis.
hmong.goods_necessities_like_medicine_gasoli: cov khoom (yam xav tau xws li tshuaj, roj) tuav kev xav tau ruaj txawm nqi yog dab tsi.
hmong.luxury_goods_restaurants_vacations: Khoom kim, tsev noj mov, so haujlwm
hmong.revenue_unchanged_by_price: Nyiaj tau los tsis hloov raws nqi

hmong.build_equity_but_mortgage_maintenance: Tsim equity, tab sis mortgage + kev tu
hmong.cheapest_option_save_more: Qhov xaiv pheej yig tshaj, txuag ntau dua

hmong.investment_percent_of_salary: Feem pua ntawm nyiaj hli uas nqis peev
hmong.describe_what_kind_of_market_you_want_: Piav qhia hom khw twg koj xav ua lag luam. AI yuav tsim 5 lub tuam txhab kev xav uas muaj nyiaj txiag tiag.
hmong.e_g_renewable_energy_startups_gaming_c: Piv txwv «cov startup zog rov tsim», «cov tuam txhab game», «kev lag luam qhov chaw», los yog tseg khoob kom sib xyaw...
hmong.reset_market_generate_new_companies: ♻ Reset khw thiab tsim cov tuam txhab tshiab
hmong.type_any_business_idea_and_ai_will_gen: Sau ib qho tswvyim lag luam twg los tau, AI yuav tsim koj tus nqi pib, tus nqi txhua hnub, thiab nqi muag. Ces khiav nws ib hnub zuj zus!
hmong.e_g_food_truck_dog_walking_tutoring_ba: Piv txwv food truck, coj dev mus ncig, qhia ntawv, tsev ci ncuav, tsim app...
hmong.close_business_start_new: ♻ Kaw lag luam thiab pib tshiab
hmong.gdp_contracting_unemployment_climbing_: GDP tsawg. Kev tsis muaj haujlwm nce. Tag nrho kev xav tau tsis txaus.
hmong.rare_and_ugly_high_inflation_low_growt: Tsis tshua muaj thiab phem: kev nce nqi siab + kev loj hlob qis. Cov qauv ntawm OPEC shock xyoo 1970. Nyuaj kho.
hmong.growth_strong_but_inflation_spiking_ce: Kev loj hlob muaj zog tab sis kev nce nqi nce siab. Lub txhab nyiaj hauv paus yuav tsuj breki hnyav.
hmong.gdp_up_inflation_contained_goldilocks_: GDP nce, kev nce nqi tswj tau. Cheeb tsam zoo tshaj — ruaj khov tam sim no.
hmong.small_net_effect_policy_levers_roughly: Cov txiaj ntsig net me. Cov lever txoj cai kwv yees rho ib leeg.
hmong.policy_inquiry_predict_the_macro_outco: 🔬 Kev tshawb nrhiav txoj cai — Kwv yees qhov macro
hmong.move_four_policy_levers_tax_govt_spend: Txav plaub tus lever txoj cai (se, tsoom fwv kev siv nyiaj, paj laum, tariff). Kwv yees qhov macro ua ntej nyeem nws. Tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis qhia.
hmong.govt_spending_lever: Tsoom fwv kev siv nyiaj, feem pua
hmong.log_this_policy_mix: 📋 Sau qhov kev sib xyaw txoj cai no
hmong.your_hypothesis_which_lever_has_the_mo: Koj qhov kev xav (hauv lub neej tiag, cov kws tshawb fawb tsis pom zoo tshaj rau tus lever twg? Vim li cas?)
hmong.e_g_tariffs_hit_prices_fast_but_the_gd: Piv txwv, tariff cuam tshuam nqi sai, tab sis kev cuam tshuam rau GDP nyob ntawm kev pauj...
hmong.i_m_stuck_show_open_questions: 🤔 Kuv tsis paub — Qhia cov lus nug qhib
hmong.open_questions_no_answer_key: Cov lus nug qhib (tsis muaj answer key)
hmong.what_combination_produces_stagflation_: Kev sib xyaw twg tsim «stagflation»? Vim li cas nws mob siab nyob rau xyoo 1970 ntawm kev nom kev tswv?
hmong.tax_cuts_and_govt_spending_both_stimul: Kev txiav se thiab tsoom fwv kev siv nyiaj ob qho txhawb GDP. Qhov twg tsim kev nce nqi ntau dua rau ib daus las stimulus? Vim li cas?
hmong.when_would_a_central_bank_deliberately: Thaum twg lub txhab nyiaj hauv paus yuav tsim recession txhob txwm? (Volcker 1979-82.)
hmong.do_tariffs_help_domestic_workers_in_th: Tariff pab cov neeg ua haujlwm hauv tsev ntev ntev, los yog thawb nqi rau txhua tus? Ob qho? Trade-off nyob qhov twg?
hmong.this_widget_hard_codes_textbook_keynes: Lub widget no hard-code cov cim Keynesian phau ntawv. Hauv supply-side economics, cov cim twg yuav thim? Nyob rau hauv MMT? Nyob rau hauv neoclassical economics (rational expectations)? Qhov twg tus qauv Keynesian muab lub cim tsis raug piv rau cov ntaub ntawv tiag?
hmong.i_can_explain_why_this_policy_mix_yiel: Kuv piav tau vim li cas qhov kev sib xyaw txoj cai no tsim cov xwm txheej macroeconomic no.
hmong.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Widget tshawb nrhiav — tsis muaj qhab nia, tsis qhia, tsis muab cov lus teb. Cov nqi lej yog kev kwv yees rau kev kawm, tsis yog ib tus qauv macro tiag; cov kev teb tiag nyob ntawm cov txheej txheem nyiaj txiag, lub peev xwm tsis siv, kev cia siab, thiab kev lag luam txawv teb chaws. Macroeconomics tseem muaj kev sib cav — cov kws tshawb fawb tsis pom zoo ntawm cov cim thiab qhov loj.
